$comment: FIGAS bug-pattern registry (docs/codebase-audit-strategy.md §4.2). Each pattern feeds scripts/audit-patterns.ts scan targets, the invariant test suite, and the ESLint rule queue. Add new patterns when a novel bug class is discovered.

patterns.description: String(Date) on a pg DATE column produces non-ISO format ('Wed Jul 22 2026...'), breaking date comparisons
patterns.prevention: toDateString() helper + DateString brand in app/types/shared.ts

patterns.description: Repository write methods, write helpers, or sql INSERT/UPDATE/DELETE called inside db.transaction()/withTransaction() without passing tx
patterns.prevention: Repository methods accept optional client?: Kysely<DB>; write helpers listed in scripts/audit-patterns.ts WRITE_HELPERS

patterns.description: generateCsrfToken(session.id) vs generateCsrfToken(cookieHeader) — token basis mismatch; session.id is empty under createCookieSessionStorage
Two functions with the same exported name in different files drift apart (clusterBookingsByDate had date normalization in one copy only)
patterns.prevention: Import from a single source; delete private duplicates

patterns.description: Passenger/booking matched to a route leg by exact origin+destination equality without a multi-stop fallback (origin-only or route-index)
patterns.prevention: Every exact origin+dest .find() must be followed by an origin-only fallback or explicit error branch (see schedule-handlers.server.ts handleAssignBooking)

patterns.description: Interactive components (dnd-kit draggables/droppables, mutation buttons) without data-testid attributes cause fragile e2e selectors
patterns.prevention: data-testid required on the root interactive element of new components
